description: Reusable PMH/PSH module applied once per session after complaint clerking, ROS, and any activated conditional modules. It should not repeat information already captured earlier.
ui_render_rule: Use ui_label or text in the UI. Never show raw backend field ids.

questions.text: Before we finish, what past medical conditions do you have that may be relevant to this problem and that we have not already covered?
Have you had any operations or procedures that may be relevant to this problem and that we have not already covered?

session_rule: Run once per session after ROS and any activated conditional modules. Skip any item already captured during complaint clerking, the opening narrative, or ROS.
note: The redundant 'OtherMedicalSurgicalHistory' was removed because its purpose is already covered by the final_closeout_question in shared.v2.json and the two main questions.
